name: Pacific Rim Brochettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently press tofu between kitchen towels to remove excess water. Slice into pieces 2-inch X 1-inch X 1/2".
2. Cut each chunk crosswise and set aside. Slice the bottom 3 inches of lemon grass and discard the rest.
3. With a wooden mallet, pound the lemon grass to release aromatic oils.
4. In a food processor, combine lemon grass with mint, ginger, garlic, pepper, cilantro stems, and green onions. Process in short bursts for 30 seconds.
5. Add remaining ingredients (soy sauce, brown sugar, liquid tamarind) and process for 1 minute.
6. Transfer the marinade to a glass container and add tofu pieces. Cover and marinate for 4 to 6 hours.
Brochette:
1. Prepare grill by heating it to medium-high heat.
2. Trim green onions to 2-inch lengths.
3. Thread vegetables and tofu onto skewers, alternating colors. Group snow peas in threes so they don't cook too quickly.
4. Place the skewers on the hot grill and brush with remaining marinade.
5. Grill, turning once, until vegetables are tender. This should take about 5 minutes.
6. Garnish with cilantro leaves and serve.
Per Serving: 258 Calories; 18g Protein; 9g Fat; 26g Carbohydrates; 0 Cholesterol; 333mg Sodium; 5g Fiber.
